title: Open access dataset integrating EEG and fNIRS during Stroop tasks
description: Simultaneous high-temporal-resolution fNIRS and EEG during a Chinese colour-word matching Stroop task, with raw and preprocessed data.
paradigm: Chinese colour-word matching Stroop; neutral and incongruent blocks
format: ZIP of nested ZIPs; TDMS; MAT; CSV/XLS; CNT; SET/FDT
access_method: Direct ZIP download; Figshare landing page
notes: Dataset-item API licenses the deposit as CC0; the article itself is CC-BY-4.0. Remote ZIP manifests were inspected by HTTP range requests without downloading the 2.05 GB archive.
task_description: Participants judged whether the display colour of an upper Chinese character matched the colour-word meaning of a lower character, using left/right mouse responses. The formal task comprised four 16-trial blocks in N-N-I-I order (neutral, neutral, incongruent, incongruent), with 2-s stimuli, 5-s inter-trial intervals, breaks and pre/post rest.
recording_count_basis: 21 unique participant-level raw fNIRS TDMS files S1.tdms-S21.tdms in the nested raw-fNIRS archive; MAT files are alternate exports of the same recordings
fnirs_format: TDMS raw; MATLAB MAT raw export; XLS/MAT preprocessed HbO/Hb
duration_basis: Raw MAT exports: 19,104–198,895 samples at 100 Hz.
features_labels_events: photoelectric marker signal shared with EEG; condition and stimulus timing || format=TDMS/MAT marker channel; dataset description || level=sample/event/participant || status=verified || evidence=remote ZIP manifests and article Methods/Data Record
features_behavior: per-trial judgment codes and reaction times for neutral and incongruent trials || format=21 participant CSV files and 21 MAT files || level=participant/trial || status=verified || evidence=remote nested-ZIP manifests and sampled CSV
features_demographics: age; sex; dominant hand || format=article Table 1 || level=participant || status=verified || evidence=Scientific Data article participant table
features_spatial_optode_metadata: 4 sources; 16 detectors; 20 channels; 3 cm source-detector spacing; 785/850 nm; frontal and parietal montage/channel order || format=article figure and dataset description || level=channel/dataset || status=verified || evidence=Scientific Data Methods and archive description
features_stimuli: Chinese colour words and non-colour words; neutral/incongruent condition definitions || format=task specification in article || level=trial/condition || status=verified || evidence=Scientific Data Methods
features_other_modalities: 34-channel EEG at 1000 Hz plus four bipolar EOG channels; raw CNT/MAT and preprocessed SET/FDT/MAT || format=CNT; MAT; SET/FDT || level=participant/sample/event || status=verified || evidence=Figshare nested-ZIP manifests and article Methods
features_other: raw fNIRS MAT exports and preprocessed HbO/Hb condition files; import/preprocessing code linked by article || format=MAT; XLS; external MATLAB code || level=participant/condition/channel || status=verified || evidence=remote ZIP manifests and article Data Record/Code availability
